steps.title: Set up the rate calculation
steps.content: To find revolutions per minute, divide the total number of revolutions by the total time in minutes: $$\frac{900 \text{ revolutions}}{50 \text{ minutes}}$$

steps.title: Simplify and find the rate
steps.content: $$\frac{900}{50} = \frac{90}{5} = 18$$ The turbine completes 18 revolutions per minute. That matches choice A — A is correct.
